markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.081 — Definition

In this subchapter “reclaimed asphalt pavement” means hot mix asphalt pavement and any accompanying tack coat, seal coat, or chip seal removed as millings or broken pavement pieces from a road during construction, reconstruction, or repavement under the authority of the department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter “reclaimed asphalt pavement” means hot mix asphalt pavement and any accompanying tack coat, seal coat, or chip seal removed as millings or broken pavement pieces from a road during construction, reconstruction, or repavement under the authority of the department.
